advantages.adv1_desc: Your orders are fully protected from front-running and destructive sandwich attacks at the Jito validator level.
advantages.adv2_desc: Your keys, your assets. VEIL is an absolutely non-custodial protocol. Your wallets are generated and encrypted locally on your device. We have no access to your funds.
advantages.adv3_desc: Smart order distribution across the full depth of Solana liquidity. Optimal trade trajectory, minimal slippage, zero trace.
advantages.adv4_desc: Transaction landing in a block in under 400ms via the Jito private circuit. No waiting, no mempool delays in every trading decision.

manifesto.headline:
SOVEREIGNTY IS NOT GIVEN.
IT IS TAKEN.
manifesto.core: Protect, trade, and route your capital through VEIL — the only financial bastion on the Solana network built for total control over liquidity.
manifesto.subhead: Cut out intermediaries. Eliminate surveillance. Become the Operator of your destiny.

veilStack.block1_desc: Private trading without compromise. Transaction routing via private Jito bundles bypassing the public mempool using hidden STELS addresses. Transactions are fully protected against sandwich attacks and front-running.
veilStack.block2_desc: Two-wallet model (Master/Stels) with local key generation and AES-256-GCM encryption on the basis of Argon2id right on your device. Autonomous control of the local database with encrypted backups. Your keys — your rules.
veilStack.block3_desc: Complete independence from centralized servers. Your messenger is your sovereign trading gateway. Two parallel interfaces (bot text-based FSM console and graphical Mini App) guarantee absolute fault tolerance and liquidity management freedom.
veilStack.nexus_meta: CURRENT STATE // NEXUS V3 - DERIVATIVES TRACK
veilStack.nexus_desc: Professional derivative track for perpetual contracts. Direct backend integration with decentralized perpetual liquidity protocols is launched and successfully functioning. Local risk engine ensures margin and liquidation control, isolated positions operate via Stels wallets, and fee payments are processed via private relayers without binding Master and Stels addresses.

footer.disclaimer: VEIL provides non-custodial routing software. We do not hold, manage, or control user assets. Trading cryptocurrencies involves substantial risk. By accessing the interface, you agree to our strict execution policies. Verify everything. Trust math.

privacyBanner.title: ● STATUS // ZERO FOOTPRINT
privacyBanner.desc: This interface functions without cookies, trackers, or analytical scripts. The session runs in isolated volatile memory on your device and is completely wiped upon page refresh.

privacyFirst.topLabel: No VCs. No paid insiders. No extraction.
privacyFirst.subline: Built for traders who move without leaving traces.

items.title: DO YOU STORE MY PRIVATE KEYS?
items.desc: No. Never. Your PIN derives your keys locally via Argon2id + HKDF. Only ciphertext and nonce are stored in your secure local browser database (IndexedDB). Without your PIN — it is just encrypted noise.

items.title: CAN YOU STEAL MY FUNDS?
items.desc: After PIN setup — no. Mathematically. We do not have access to your keys. Not technically. Not legally. Not in any way.

items.title: WHAT HAPPENS TO KEYS AFTER A TRANSACTION?
items.desc: Immediately after Ed25519 signing, the key is wiped from RAM via the Zeroize trait. A full memory dump of the active application process at that moment yields nothing.

items.title: WHAT IF YOU GET HACKED?
items.desc: The attacker gets only encrypted bytes. Without the PIN, decryption is impossible. Your funds stay with you.

items.title: WHAT IS A STELS WALLET?
items.desc: A second wallet inside the terminal. Used as a transit node in Veil Flow. Generated once, for a single operation. Destroyed afterwards. Your main wallet never appears in the final on-chain transaction.

items.title: I LOST MY PIN. WHAT DO I DO?
items.desc:
Nothing. Access to funds is lost permanently. No backdoor. No recovery. This is not a flaw — it is the guarantee that no one but you can access them.

Write your PIN down. Store it offline.

items.title: I ACCIDENTALLY RAN /PURGE. CAN THE DATA BE RECOVERED?
items.desc: No. Purge is irreversible. All keys, operation history, and settings are destroyed. That is exactly how it is supposed to work.

items.title: MY TRANSACTION IS STUCK. WHAT SHOULD I DO?
items.desc: Jito Block Engine operates atomically — either the bundle executes in full or it is cancelled. Stuck transactions do not exist. Funds are not lost. If you see a delay, it is a network issue on Solana's side. Retry the operation.

items.title: SOLANA WENT DOWN. ARE MY FUNDS SAFE?
items.desc: Yes. Your funds are on the blockchain — not with us. A network outage means temporary terminal unavailability. Not asset loss.

items.title: WHAT IS MEV AND HOW DOES VEIL PROTECT AGAINST IT?
items.desc:
MEV (Maximal Extractable Value) — bots that see your transaction in the mempool and insert theirs before it. You get a worse price. The bot takes the difference.

Veil routes all orders through Jito Block Engine directly to slot leaders. The public mempool is bypassed entirely. Sandwich attacks are structurally impossible.

items.title: WHAT IS VEIL FLOW?
items.desc: Stealth routing — a mechanism for introducing controlled entropy into Solana transaction chains. Flows fragment on-the-fly and pass through ephemeral cryptographic circuits within a single Jito bundle, eliminating any possibility of end-to-end balance monitoring by third parties.

items.title: IS THIS LEGAL?
items.desc: Yes. Transaction privacy is a legitimate right. The protocol must not be used for money laundering, terrorist financing, or sanctions evasion. By using Veil, you confirm that the origin of your assets is lawful.

items.title: WHAT IS THE FEE?
items.desc: 0.8% of the volume of each operation. Solana network fees and Jito tips are on top, paid separately. No hidden fees.

items.title: IS THERE A SUBSCRIPTION FEE?
items.desc: No. You pay only for operations.

items.title: HOW FAST ARE ORDERS EXECUTED?
items.desc: Via Jito Block Engine — within a single slot. Solana produces a block every ~400 ms.

items.title: WHICH ASSETS ARE SUPPORTED?
items.desc: All tokens on Solana available across major liquidity pools — SOL, USDC, USDT, and the full long tail of SPL tokens including memecoins.

items.title: IS THERE SUPPORT?
items.desc: Telegram. We respond there. Security questions are priority.

sections.title: MARKET VOLATILITY
sections.desc:
Digital assets can go to zero. Fast. Past performance means nothing.

You already know this — but it needs to be written here.

items: Solana — the protocol depends on network stability. Delays, forks, or L1 failures can make transaction execution temporarily impossible.
Helius, Jito, and external liquidity pools — external infrastructure. Failures on their side can temporarily restrict access to market data and execution.

sections.title: SMART CONTRACT RISKS
sections.desc:
During swaps, funds interact with third-party liquidity pools — Raydium, Orca, and others.

VEIL is not responsible for bugs, exploits, or hacks of these protocols. Verify what you are signing.

items: Loss of PIN — irreversible loss of access to funds. No backdoor. No recovery. No support that will fix it. Write down your PIN. Store it offline.
You are responsible for the security of your device and Telegram account. Compromised device — compromised assets.

sections.title: EXPERIMENTAL TECHNOLOGIES
sections.desc:
Veil Flow and integration Arcium TEE — early-stage technologies.

Usage implies accepting the risks that accompany any frontier protocol. Do not invest what you are not prepared to lose.

sections.title: WHAT WE DO NOT COLLECT
sections.desc:
No names. No emails. No phone numbers. No IP addresses.

Your profile is your public Solana address. Nothing more.

items: Private keys are encrypted via AES-256-GCM. Your PIN is processed via Argon2id + HKDF. The derived key exists only in RAM at the moment of signing.
The server never receives your encrypted data. All files (ciphertext and nonce) are stored strictly locally on your device. Without your PIN — decryption is mathematically impossible.
We do not have access to your funds. Not technically. Not legally. Not in any way.
Veil Flow obfuscates transaction trajectories. No logs of network activity or metadata within cryptographic circuits are stored.
Jito Block Engine makes your intents invisible in the public mempool until confirmed on-chain.

sections.title: LOCAL STORAGE
sections.desc:
Operation history, address book, and settings are stored in your local browser database (IndexedDB) in encrypted form.

The /purge command or account deletion destroys data without the possibility of recovery. Irreversible.

sections.title: TRACKING
sections.desc:
The terminal does not use third-party trackers.

No Google Analytics. No Facebook Pixel. No geolocation. No device fingerprinting.

Zero.

sections.title: WHAT THIS IS
sections.desc:
VEIL is a software interface for interacting with the Solana blockchain. Not a bank. Not a custodian. Not a financial advisor. Not a centralized exchange.

This is a tool. You decide what to do with it.

sections.title: YOUR KEYS — YOUR RESPONSIBILITY
sections.desc: Your PIN derives your keys locally. Encrypted bytes are stored strictly on your local device (IndexedDB). Without your PIN — decryption is mathematically impossible.

items: You bear full responsibility for the safety of your PIN. Write it down. Store it offline. Do not share it with anyone.
If you lose your PIN, your funds are inaccessible. No backdoor. No recovery. Mathematics makes no exceptions.

sections.title: TRANSACTION EXECUTION
sections.desc: VEIL provides access to third-party execution infrastructure — Jito Block Engine and decentralized liquidity protocols.

items: MEV protection reduces the risk of frontrunning. There is no 100% execution guarantee during extreme network congestion.
Network fees and Jito tips are paid by you. They are not refundable under any circumstances.

sections.title: VEIL FLOW AND PRIVACY
sections.desc: Stealth routing protects the privacy of legitimate trading strategies.

items: The protocol must not be used for money laundering, terrorist financing, or sanctions evasion.
By using the protocol, you confirm the legal origin of your assets.
VEIL is not responsible for losses from market volatility, smart contract bugs of third-party DEXs, or Solana network failures.
Trading digital assets carries the risk of losing 100% of your capital. You know this.

documentation.subhero: CLANDESTINE SPOT & PERPETUAL EXCHANGE ON SOLANA

sections.title: THE PROBLEM
sections.desc: Solana is fast and cheap. Its architecture is also completely transparent. Three problems arise from this:
items: Custodial risk: Most trading bots in Telegram store private keys on centralized servers in plaintext.
MEV extraction: Transactions in the public mempool are subject to sandwich attacks. You pay the spread to bots, not the market.
On-chain tracking: Analytical platforms (Nansen, Arkham) link sender and receiver addresses in real time. Your strategy is visible.

Veil addresses all three through local encryption, private mempool bundling, and multi-hop routing. Your keys stay on your device, orders are shielded until confirmed, and transaction graphs are fragmented.

sections.title: KEY SECURITY
sections.desc: Zero-trust by default. Since encryption is performed entirely on your device, we have no technical or mathematical way to access your files or keys.

subsections.title: 2.1. HOW KEYS ARE STORED
items: When creating a secure container (Vault), your private key is encrypted locally using AES-256-GCM.
Your PIN is processed via Argon2id. The resulting key is passed to HKDF.
Only the encrypted payload and salt/nonce are stored in your secure local client-side database (IndexedDB) or encrypted folder.
Decryption occurs exclusively in random-access memory (RAM) during the signing process. The PIN is never saved.

subsections.title: 2.2. DELETION AFTER SIGNING
items: Immediately after Ed25519 signing, raw key bytes are completely zeroed out in RAM using active security standards. A memory dump of the active application process yields zero plaintext secrets.
A local device compromise does not expose your funds without your active master PIN.

sections.title: EXECUTION MECHANISM
sections.desc: Speed. MEV protection. Shielded from public mempool vulnerability.

subsections.title: 3.1. JITO BLOCK ENGINE
items: All orders (swaps, sniping) are routed through Jito Block Engine as atomic bundles.
Your transactions are invisible to public RPC nodes until they land on-chain.
Atomic execution: either the entire sequence executes as requested, or it is safely reverted. Front-running and sandwich attacks are effectively prevented.

subsections.title: 3.2. STELS MULTI-EXCHANGE ROUTING
items: VEIL's intelligent routing engine calculates optimal swap paths across the entire Solana market depth in real time. Automatic liquidity distribution minimizes price impact.

sections.title: VEIL FLOW (BETA)
sections.desc: Introducing controlled entropy into Solana transaction chains. Flows fragment on-the-fly and pass through ephemeral cryptographic circuits, eliminating any possibility of end-to-end balance monitoring by third parties.

sections.title: INTERFACES
sections.desc: Graphical User Interface (GUI) for visually-oriented traders. Command Line Interface (CLI) for those who think in commands.

subsections.title: 5.1. TELEGRAM TERMINAL (MINI APP)
items: A fully functional graphical interface inside a Telegram WebView.
Real-time charts and order books.
Portfolio overview. Slippage configuration. One-click execution.

subsections.title: 5.2. VEIL CORE — COMMAND LINE
items: Text and voice input.
Natural language parsing: instruct the assistant in plain words, review the compiled trade parameters on-screen, and approve the signature locally on your device.
"Swap 50 SOL to USDC with 0.5% slippage via Jito" — the bundle compiles and gets signed automatically.

subsections.title: WHAT IS DESTROYED:
items: Master Wallet (main wallet) — wiped.
STELS wallets — wiped.
Address book — cleared.
PIN code and session keys — deleted.
RAM — cleared using Zeroize.

subsections.title: WHY IT MATTERS:
items: Most wallets offer no exit. Data accumulates and remains.
PURGE is a hard guarantee. Once activated — there is nothing to steal. Nothing to extract. Nothing to demand.
